description: This file provides runtime-safe, best-effort schema self-healing functions for MySQL databases, specifically adding missing columns and indexes related to 'persona_drafts' and 'persona_final' tables. It includes functions to check for table, column, and index existence, and a main exported function to perform schema adjustments if needed.

methods.name: _mysqlHasColumn
methods.description: Checks if a specific column exists in a given table.

methods.name: _mysqlHasIndex
methods.description: Checks if a specific index exists in a given table.

methods.name: _mysqlHasTable
methods.description: Checks if a specific table exists in the database.

methods.name: _ensurePersonaDraftsPersonaIdColumnMysql
methods.description: Adds 'persona_id' column and index to 'persona_drafts' table if missing.

methods.name: _ensurePersonaFinalPersonaIdColumnMysql
methods.description: Adds 'persona_id' column and index to 'persona_final' table if missing.
